description_long: This modern bungalow features a striking asymmetrical roof with a deep overhang, providing both shade and architectural interest. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious covered porch with a glass railing, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light gray and wood-textured panels, adding warmth and contrast to the design. A side garage with a flat driveway is integrated into the structure, while the rear and side elevations display a mix of smaller windows and solid wall sections for privacy. The property is set on a raised green lawn with concrete walkways leading to the entrances. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and modern materials.
description: A modern bungalow with an asymmetrical roof, large glass windows, and a covered porch with glass railing, set on a raised green lawn with integrated garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass windows, covered porch with glass railing, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, garage door, and concrete walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows, solid wall sections, and the raised green lawn wrapping around the property.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the expansive glass facade, porch, and the dramatic roof overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and scattered side windows
